name: ng-blatui
description: Accessible Angular UI library (Angular 21 & 22, standalone, signals, zoneless, SSR-ready) ported from BlatUI. Components, blocks, charts and ready-made page templates, themed with Tailwind CSS v4 + oklch design tokens.

inputs.name: thresholds
inputs.type: readonly { at: number; tone: keyof typeof TONES; }[]
